name: KoKo Petroleum Inc.
summary: KoKo Petroleum Inc., an exploratory stage company, engages in the exploration, exploitation, development, production, and acquisition of natural gas and crude oil. As of May 16, 2005, the company owned a 45% working interest(37.5% net revenue interest) in oil and gas leases located in Navarro County, Texas; and a 10% working interest(8% net revenue interest) in oil and gas leases located in the province of Saskatchewan, Canada, which consisted of one well. The company was incorporated in 2004 and is based in Penticton, Canada.
